# coolify_s3_storage (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a Coolify S3 storage destination.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_s3_storage" "example" {
  uuid = "existing-s3-storage-uuid"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `uuid` (String) The unique identifier of the S3 storage.

### Read-Only

- `access_key` (String, Sensitive) The S3 access key.
- `bucket` (String) The S3 bucket name.
- `description` (String) A description of the S3 storage.
- `endpoint` (String) The S3 endpoint URL.
- `name` (String) The name of the S3 storage.
- `region` (String) The S3 region.
- `secret_key` (String, Sensitive) The S3 secret key.
